title: Caramelized Tagine with Algerian Jammy Sauce
description: A sweet and savory tagine dish made with caramelized sugar and a rich algerian jammy sauce.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the springy and caramelized ingredients.
In a separate saucepan, combine the sugar and algerian sauce.
Heat the saucepan over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the sugar dissolves.
Pour the sauce over the springy mixture and stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and cover with foil.
Bake for 25 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes.
While the tagine is baking, prepare the jammy sauce by heating the sauce in a saucepan over low heat.
Once the tagine is done, serve hot with the jammy sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with additional algerian sauce and sugar, if desired.
